description.value:
A farming scythe adapted for use as a weapon of war, with the blade straightened or reset parallel to the shaft. Its sweeping cuts can carry through multiple targets.

Basic: Two-Handed, Heavy, Reach, Melee 2d4, Entangle, Keen, Puncture, Trip

rmeData.masterPerk: When you reduce an enemy to 0 hit points with slashing damage, you can choose to apply the remaining damage to any other target within your range, instead of only adjacent targets.
